ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( /* Missing + Additional Mappings */ AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Wrong Product"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Wrong Batch"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Wrong Delivery") ), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Missing")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Additional")) ),
/* Single Status Mappings */ AND( ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Additional Quantity/Product"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Additional")) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Damaged/Broken"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Damage")) ), AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Documentation Issue - Wrong Credit Note"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Documentation Issue - Wrong Receipt"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Documentation Issue - Wrong/Missing Invoice") ), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Wrong Docs")) ), AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Labeling Issue - Damaged"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Labeling Issue - Not Labeled"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Labeling Issue - Wrong Price Tag"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Labeling Issue - Wrong Registration Number") ), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Mislabeling")) ), AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Late Arrival - Customer Complaint"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Late Arrival - Dispatch") ), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Order Not Received")) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Complaint__r.Category__c, "Missing Quantity"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Missing")) ) )
